Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Receipts For Distribution From Additional Heirs
Off Calendar Oct-26-2022 Continued To Nov-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann, for and with Linda Harrington, (both via Zoom) Personal Representative.

Mr. Vann confirms that distribution has been made to Catherine Weaver and that Ms. Weaver has confirmed the preceding via email and copies of the same have been submitted with a recently filed declaration, but that Ms. Weaver has not returned a signed receipt.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Nov-28-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Maloney. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Receipts For Distribution From Additional Heirs
Off Calendar Sep-28-2022 Continued To Oct-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Receipts For Distribution From Additional Heirs
Off Calendar Sep-19-2022 Continued To Sep-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Receipts For Distribution From Additional Heirs
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Continued To Sep-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann, via Zoom, for Linda Harrington, Personal Representative.

Mr. Vann reports that the tax matter has been resolved and that distributions are ready to be executed. The court queries counsel regarding tax withholdings. Mr. Vann reports that he was advised that withholdings were not required. The court summarizes what Mr. Vann has advised regarding his plan to comply with the court's request for the filing of receipts for distribution.

The matter is continued to Sep-19-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Receipts For Distribution From Additional Heirs
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Continued To Aug-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Receipts For Distribution From Additional Heirs
Off Calendar Jun-20-2022 Continued To Jul-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann, via Zoom, for and with Linda Harrington, Trustee.

Mr. Vann and Ms. Harrington report of issues contacting the CPA who was assisting with this matter and accordingly, Mr. Vann has reached-out to a different CPA and reports that he expects to hear from them sometime today or tomorrow. There are additional discussions regarding tax withholdings and tax liabilities which remain unclear to Ms. Harrington.

After further discussion, the matter is continued to Jul-25-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Receipts For Distribution From Additional Heirs
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Continued To Jun-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann, via Zoom, for Linda Harrington, Personal Representative.

Mr. Vann reports of a flurry of communication between his client and the CPA and that his client's main concern is that the CPA advised her that she may be personally liable for the non-citizen distributions and is unable to confirm the amount withheld for previous distributions. Mr. Vann also confirms that his client's attempt at finding someone in the U.K. to take responsibility was unsuccessful. The court acknowledges the difficulties with this matter but reminds Mr. Vann of its position and of the objective to resolve this matter.

The Status on Filing Receipts, etc., is continued to Jun-20-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Receipts For Distribution From Additional Heirs
Off Calendar Apr-25-2022 Continued To May-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The court advises that it will be continuing this matter without issuing an Order to Appear at this time.

The Status Hearing is continued to May-09-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Receipts For Distribution From Additional Heirs
Off Calendar Apr-13-2022 Continued To Apr-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Receipts For Distribution From Additional Heirs
Off Calendar Mar-21-2022 Continued To Apr-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Receipts For Distribution From Additional Heirs
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Continued To Mar-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann appeared by zoom for Linda Harrington.

Mr. Vann stated that he has had difficulty communicating with his client, that he has received no responses from her, and that last week he received an email that she sent to the CPA where she is asking a tax question with regard to whether she is required to make a substantial withholding from a distribution to a non-citizen beneficiary. Mr. Vann also stated that he suspects she is waiting for a response from the CPA, that his client also mentioned that she is going to be in the UK two weeks from now and that she is going to reach out to the beneficiaries to see if anyone else will take over trusteeship of this case, that as far as he knows, this is his client's last case and proposed continuing this matter for 30-days. Status on distribution of trust shares to Catherine Weaver is continued to March 21, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on distribution of the remaining share for Megan Shorland is set for December 19, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on distribution of the remaining share for Thomas Shorland is set for December 17, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on distribution of the remaining share for Emily Shorland is set for December 15, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Receipts For Distribution From Additional Heirs

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Receipts For Additional Distributions To Trust Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Linda Harrington.

Mr. Vann provided an endorsed copy of the receipt on distribution for Luke O'Donoghue and stated that Patrick's receipt is for his share, dividends and interest. Status on filing of receipts for additional distributions to trust beneficiaries is taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Receipts For Additional Distributions To Trust Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Apr-01-2014 Continued To Apr-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Linda Harrington (Trustee).

Mr. Vann stated that a supplemental declaration was filed, that $10,000.00 was withheld and never distributed to the Beneficiary, that it is now distributed and that they are waiting for a receipt from England. Mr. Vann also stated that Catherine Weaver was born in 1996 and that they are waiting for a copy of the birth certificate. Status on filing of additional receipts for additional distributions to trust beneficiaries was continued to April 22, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
